job_description:
Responsibilities

3 months

Location

Valoriz Digital, Technopark, Trivandrum

Note: Interns who demonstrate exceptional performance during the internship will be offered a full-time opportunity with strong career growth in DevOps, cloud infrastructure, and automation technologies.

job_description:
Datacom Developer

Role Overview

  • Experience Required: 4+ Years
  • Notice Period: Immediate to 30 Days

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and optimize high-performance networking solutions using DPDK, Kubernetes, and containerized/CNF technologies.
  • Implement and maintain software in C++ and/or Python with expertise in object-oriented design.
  • Apply professional software engineering practices across the full SDLC (coding standards, code reviews, source control, testing, etc.).
  • Design and troubleshoot advanced networking protocols (TCP/IP, UDP, ICMP, VLAN, IPSec, Multicast) and overlay technologies.
  • Optimize performance using Performance Enhancing Proxies (PEP), TCP spoofing, and compression techniques.
  • Demonstrate strong knowledge of IP Networking, L2/L3 switching/routing, and satellite network implementation.
  • Leverage Linux kernel namespaces and IP Fast Path approaches (OFP, DPDK, ODP).
  • Deploy scalable containerized IP networking applications using Kubernetes on AWS/Azure/cloud platforms.
  • Utilize OpenShift, Helm, and Terraform for automation and orchestration.
  • Collaborate with SDN controllers and optimize multithreaded, multi-core/embedded environments.
  • Automate testing, tasks, and data analysis with Python.
  • Manage software configurations using Bitbucket and GitLab.
  • Apply Agile/SAFe methodologies for iterative development.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Virtualization Networking (OVS, NSX).
  • Familiarity with SDN controllers and Linux kernel namespace concepts.

Contact

For inquiries, email: r.reshma@thinkpalm.com
summary: Datacom Developer with 4+ years of experience in DPDK, Kubernetes, and C++/Python. Requires expertise in networking protocols and cloud-based solutions.

job_title: Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer (PostgreSQL) - 6+ Years
job_description:
Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer (PostgreSQL) - 6+ Years

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer with specialized, expert-level proficiency in PostgreSQL. In this role, you will lead the architectural design, schema optimization, and long-term scalability of our data systems driving enterprise-level applications. You will bridge the gap between complex business requirements and high-performance database execution. This role requires an expert who can write procedural code and implement advanced database designs to handle massive data volumes securely.

Key Responsibilities

  • Database Architecture: Architect clean, scalable PostgreSQL relational schemas, tables, and views.
  • Procedural Development: Write and maintain advanced PL/pgSQL stored procedures, functions, and complex triggers.
  • Performance Tuning: Analyze EXPLAIN execution plans to eliminate query bottlenecks and optimize memory footprints.
  • Data Modeling: Formulate logical and physical data structures utilizing normalization and dimensional modeling techniques.
  • Optimization Strategies: Implement custom table partitioning, sharding architectures, and strategic indexing.
  • Cross-Team Collaboration: Work closely with backend application developers to build efficient APIs and JSONB query strategies.
  • Data Governance: Enforce strict data integrity constraints, access controls, and row-level security protocols.
  • Lifecycle Management: Build database migration workflows, schema versioning scripts, and support ongoing CI/CD deployments.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Experience: 6 to 10 years of professional database engineering experience, with 4+ years strictly focused on PostgreSQL.
  • Language Mastery: Deep expertise in ANSI SQL and advanced, native PostgreSQL dialect patterns.
  • Feature Expertise: Proven usage of PostgreSQL-specific features like JSONB, window functions, arrays, and custom types.
  • Internals Knowledge: Solid understanding of engine internals including MVCC, VACUUM processes, and Write-Ahead Logging (WAL).
  • Automation Mastery: Good automation skills using scripting languages like Python or Bash.
  • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent engineering disciplines.

Preferred / Good-to-Have Skills

  • Cloud Infrastructure: Hands-on experience deploying managed PostgreSQL systems like AWS RDS, Azure Database, or GCP Cloud SQL.
  • Migration Experience: Background in porting enterprise workloads from Oracle (PL/SQL) or SQL Server to PostgreSQL.
  • Monitoring Tools: Experience diagnosing health through pg_stat_statements, Prometheus, Grafana, or pgAdmin.
  • Vector Extensions: Exposure to pgvector for handling AI/ML vector embeddings is a strong asset.
  • Hybrid Systems: Basic knowledge of NoSQL systems such as Redis, MongoDB, or Cassandra.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at r.reshma@thinkpalm.com.
summary: Senior SQL Database Designer & Developer with PostgreSQL expertise, leading architectural design, performance tuning, and data governance for enterprise applications.

job_description:
Finance Executive (02-05 Years)

Qualification: M.Com/MBA (Finance)/CA Inter

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Finance Executive to oversee and support key financial operations within the organization. The role involves managing financial reconciliations, preparing reports, ensuring regulatory compliance, and conducting financial analysis to support informed decision-making.

Key Responsibilities: - Organise and maintain financial records, general ledger accounts for the company. - Assist in the preparation of financial reports, balance sheets, and budget sheets. - Update financial data in databases to ensure accuracy and immediate availability. - Compute taxes and prepare tax returns. Ensure GST Return filing and TDS return filings are accurate and on time. - Update accounts receivable and issue invoices. Update accounts payable and perform reconciliations. - Secure financial information by completing database backups and maintaining confidentiality. - Prepare and submit weekly/monthly reports as needed. - Maintain accounting controls by following policies and procedures, complying with federal, state, and local financial legal requirements. - Track ROC and RBI filings in liaison with the Company Secretary. - Support other company operational tasks as needed.

Job Requirements: - Accurate maintenance of financial records and general ledger accounts. - Preparation of financial reports, balance sheets, and budgets. - Knowledge of taxation (GST, TDS) and tax return preparation. - Accounts receivable/payable management and reconciliations. - Ensuring data accuracy, confidentiality, and compliance with financial regulations. - Proficiency in accounting software and MS Excel. - Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Contact: For applications, email your updated resume to atta@verteil.com.
summary: Detail-oriented Finance Executive with 2-5 years experience managing financial operations, preparing reports, ensuring compliance, and handling tax returns. Requires expertise in GST, TDS, and MS Excel.

job_description:
Company: Jachoos Technologies Pvt Ltd Location: Infopark, Kochi, Kerala Experience: 1-5 years (IT Experience is mandatory)

About the Role JachOOs Technologies Pvt. Ltd, a leading IT solution provider in Dubai, UAE, is expanding operations and seeking a Lead Generation Specialist to drive business growth by acquiring new clients for IT services. The role requires generating qualified leads and executing B2B sales processes.

Key Responsibilities - Generate and qualify leads via LinkedIn, email campaigns, cold calling, and networking. - Engage decision-makers (CEOs, Founders, Marketing Heads, IT Managers). - Promote services: Web Hosting, Website Design, Digital Marketing (SEO, PPC, Social Media), Mobile App Development (iOS/Android/Hybrid), and Custom Software Development. - Schedule client meetings and presentations. - Maintain CRM records and build a strong sales pipeline. - Prepare proposals and support sales closure.

Required Skills & Qualifications - 1–5 years in IT Sales, Business Development, or Lead Generation. - Proven experience selling Website Design, Digital Marketing, Mobile App Development, or Software Development services. - Proficiency in LinkedIn Sales Navigator, CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho), and email outreach. - Strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills. - Ability to identify opportunities and convert prospects.

Preferred Skills - B2B lead generation for Hosting, Cloud, Media, and Digital Marketing. - Familiarity with HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho CRM, Apollo. - Knowledge of web technologies, mobile apps, software development lifecycle, and digital marketing. - Experience in proposal creation and client relationship management.

What We Offer - Competitive salary + performance incentives. - Career advancement opportunities. - Training and professional development. - Dynamic, collaborative work environment.

Contact: Share your resume at hr@jachoos.com.
summary: Seeking a Lead Generation Specialist with 1-5 years of IT sales experience to drive business growth by acquiring new clients for IT services including web hosting, digital marketing, and software development.

job_description:
Associate Technical Artist - Fresher

We are seeking an Associate Technical Artist (Fresher) to bridge game engineering and art pipelines. This role focuses on building systems and tools to integrate creative content into games efficiently. You will collaborate with both code and assets, contributing to pipeline development and real-game implementation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Integrate game assets (UI, sprites, textures) into the engine using structured workflows
  • Ensure assets adhere to technical standards, naming conventions, and hierarchy rules
  • Maintain consistency and quality in content integration
  • Demonstrate basic understanding of game editor timeline animations
  • Solve technical problems during production

Tool Development

  • Build tools/scripts using Python, JavaScript, or C# to:
  • Automate asset processing
  • Validate prefabs and configurations
  • Improve pipeline efficiency
  • Develop solutions to reduce manual effort for artists and designers

Codebase Contribution

  • Hook up assets into features using code
  • Debug integration issues
  • Support UI and system-level implementation tasks

Creative-Technical Alignment

  • Understand how visual assets are structured and used in-game
  • Collaborate with artists to ensure assets are visually correct and technically optimized
  • Balance visual quality with performance constraints

Performance Awareness

  • Optimize assets for:
  • Memory usage
  • Texture sizes and formats
  • Efficient atlas usage
  • Identify pipeline inefficiencies and suggest improvements

Required Skills (Must Have)

  • Basic programming knowledge in JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, or Python
  • Basic understanding of Unity or Cocos game engines
  • Familiarity with game assets (sprites, UI elements, textures)
  • Basic debugging and logical problem-solving skills
  • Ability to work with both code and art assets

Good to Have

  • Experience with editor scripting or pipeline tools
  • Familiarity with asset workflows or game UI setup
  • Understanding of texture atlases and optimization basics
  • Interest in technical systems and creative workflows

Contact: Share your resume at careersindia@rubyseven.com.
summary: The Associate Technical Artist (Fresher) role combines engineering and art to build tools, integrate assets, and optimize game performance using Python and Unity.

job_description:
Business Analyst Intern (AI & Product Innovation)

About the Role

Voyon Technology Services Private Limited is seeking a Business Analyst Intern with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Product Innovation, and Cloud Solutions for its AI-powered HRMS product, Voyon Folks HRMS. The ideal candidate should be passionate about exploring emerging AI technologies, identifying practical business use cases, and recommending innovative features that enhance product capabilities and customer experience.

Key Responsibilities - Research the latest AI trends, tools, and technologies relevant to HRMS and enterprise software. - Identify realistic and business-focused AI features for integration into Voyon Folks HRMS. - Analyze customer requirements, market trends, and competitor offerings. - Prepare feature requirements, business documentation, reports, and presentations. - Collaborate with product and development teams to translate ideas into product enhancements. - Evaluate AI copilots, AI agents, and automation opportunities for HR processes.

Required Skills - Recently completed a degree in Business Administration, Management, or Engineering. - Strong interest in Generative AI, Agentic AI, automation, and emerging technologies. - Hands-on exposure to AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, or similar platforms. - Excellent verbal and written English communication skills. - Strong presentation, analytical, and problem-solving abilities. - Ability to conduct independent research and present actionable recommendations. - Self-motivated, curious, and eager to learn new technologies.

What We Offer - Hands-on exposure to AI-driven product development and innovation. - Opportunity to contribute to real-world AI initiatives within an enterprise HRMS platform. - Mentorship from experienced product, business, and technology leaders. - A dynamic learning environment focused on AI, cloud technologies, and software products. - Potential opportunity for a full-time role based on performance.

Contact Information Interested candidates may apply to careers@voyon.net with their resume and a brief note describing how AI can improve HR processes and employee experience.
summary: Business Analyst Intern to explore AI innovations in HRMS, enhancing product features and customer experience. Opportunity for mentorship and potential full-time role.

job_description:
.NET Developer

We are seeking Senior and Junior .NET Developers to join our team in Kollam, Kerala. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining .NET applications, web services, SQL databases, and front-end components. This position offers growth in a collaborative and innovative environment.

Senior .NET Developers (3–4 Years Experience)

  • Design, develop, and maintain ASP.NET MVC applications, .NET components, Web APIs, and services using ADO.NET/Entity Framework.
  • Build and manage SQL Server databases (schemas, views, triggers, stored procedures).
  • Create responsive UIs with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery.
  • Deploy applications, troubleshoot issues, and maintain technical documentation.
  • Lead complex feature implementation, conduct code reviews, and mentor team members.
  • Collaborate with QA, UI/UX, and Product teams to deliver projects on schedule.

Junior .NET Developers (1–2 Years Experience)

  • Assist in developing, testing, and maintaining .NET applications.
  • Write clean, scalable C# and ASP.NET code.
  • Support front-end development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery.
  • Work with SQL Server databases (queries, stored procedures).
  • Debug issues under guidance, participate in code reviews, and maintain documentation.
  • Use Git for version control and assist with deployments.

Required Skills

  • Proficiency in ASP.NET, MVC, C#, VB.NET, MS SQL Server, T-SQL.
  • Experience with Entity Framework/ADO.NET, Web Services/Web APIs.
  • Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery.
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively.

Location: Kollam, Kerala Contact: Send resumes to hr@jupiterbs.com
summary: Senior and Junior .NET Developers needed for application design, development, and database management. Requires ASP.NET, C#, SQL Server, and collaborative project delivery.

job_description:
HR & Client Operations Executive

🚨 Important Eligibility Criteria

  • This is a fast-paced, multi-functional role requiring immediate operational handling.
  • Strictly for candidates with 1–2 years of professional experience in corporate HR, recruitment, or client operations. Freshers, interns, and recent graduates will not be considered.

Job Summary

We seek a versatile and proactive HR & Client Operations Executive to: - Manage internal HR operations and employee productivity tracking. - Act as a bridge between clients and deployed resources. - Deliver HR & Payroll module demos and training to prospective clients.

Key Responsibilities

1. Internal HR Operations & Productivity Tracking

  • End-to-end recruitment & onboarding: Source, screen, and interview talent for internal and client needs.
  • Monitor timesheets/project logs for billable hours and productivity.
  • Maintain employee records, manage leave tracking, and organize team-building activities.

2. Client Coordination & Staff Augmentation Support

  • Conduct monthly client reviews for performance feedback.
  • Gather requirements for upcoming technical resource needs.
  • Resolve operational gaps between deployed employees and client managers.

3. Odoo HR & Payroll Product Advocacy

  • Master Odoo HR/Payroll modules for client demos and training.
  • Conduct onboarding sessions for clients implementing HR/Payroll solutions.

Required Skills & Qualifications - 1–2 years of experience in HR operations, IT recruitment, or client-facing roles. - MBA in HR, Post Graduate Diploma in HR, or a related Bachelor’s degree. - Strong organizational skills for tracking timesheets and project data. - Excellent communication in English (written/verbal) for client interactions. - Tech-savvy with proficiency in Odoo, MS Office (Excel), and presentation tools.

What We Offer - A diverse role blending HR, client management, and product consulting. - Direct mentorship in a collaborative tech team environment.

Apply Now

Send your resume to: hr.clientops@infintor.odoo.com
summary: Seeking an HR & Client Operations Executive with 1-2 years of experience to manage recruitment, client coordination, and Odoo HR/Payroll training. Requires strong organizational and communication skills.

job_description:
ERP Support & Systems Specialist

Job Summary We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Junior ERP Support & Systems Specialist to join our technology team. In this role, you will focus on maintaining our core business systems, providing front-line functional and technical ERP support, and automating routine operational tasks. You will play a key role in ensuring data integrity, managing system access, and keeping our infrastructure patched and running efficiently.

Key Responsibilities - ERP Support & Maintenance: Provide front-line functional and technical support for the enterprise ERP system. Troubleshoot user daily issues, manage user access/permissions, and ensure overall data integrity. - System Maintenance: Perform routine server maintenance, software patching, and essential system updates to ensure optimal performance and uptime. - Automation & Scripting: Develop and maintain custom scripts (Python, PowerShell) to automate routine maintenance tasks and optimize systems administration workflows. - Basic Security & Compliance: Assist the security team by maintaining basic security hardening for endpoints and servers, and monitoring system access logs. - Collaboration & Reporting: Participate in regular stand-ups and technical meetings with both the client's internal team and our project managers to provide updates on system health and support tickets.

Required Skills & Qualifications - Minimum Experience Required: 1.5 to 2+ years of hands-on, professional corporate experience in Odoo support or IT operations. Please note that freshers, interns, and candidates with only academic project experience will NOT be considered for this role. - Technical Skills: Hands-on familiarity with enterprise ERP systems (e.g., Odoo, SAP, Oracle, or Microsoft Dynamics). Proficiency in writing basic automation scripts using Python. Basic understanding of operating system maintenance (Windows/Linux servers) and patch management. - Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

How to Apply - Submit your application here - Email your resume to: aterp.support@infintor.odoo.com
summary: Support and maintain ERP systems, automate tasks with Python, and collaborate on system security and updates. Requires 1.5-2 years of professional ERP/IT experience.
